description:
A backup software for your Mac or Windows PC.


New Features
- Added a backup plan option to specify whether to report, ignore, or materialize dataless ("cloud-only") files such as OneDrive Files On-Demand and Dropbox files. When set to "Materialize", Arq triggers the user's sync engine to hydrate the file before reading it. A free-disk-space safety gate skips materialize when free space drops below a configurable threshold.
